components.name: Step Button
components.description: Primary action button for form navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #027473; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #015757; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(2, 116, 115, 0.2); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.css: .ds-card-glass { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }

narrative.overview: The Health Metro visual system is designed to evoke absolute trust, professional efficiency, and modern medical excellence.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: The primary teal is used on ≤15% of the screen.

rules.name: The Glass Rule
rules.body: Glass cards are reserved for floating containers.

dos: Do use Medical Teal for step indicators.
